AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR.ATTRIBUTE_ID ORDER BY   REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
